summary: All findings are transitive vulnerabilities in the Solana ecosystem (bigint-buffer, uuid<11.1.1) inherited via @solana/web3.js + @solana/spl-token. None are directly callable from the root governance UI. None can reach signing/transfer/burn without the full AND-of-explicit-env-flags + canary allowlist + cap chain passing. No clean fix exists (npm audit fix --force would downgrade @solana/spl-token to 0.1.8, breaking the SDK). Proceeding to P3A/P3B requires either a formal operator-approved accepted-risk doc OR an alternative SDK / vendor patch.
auditEngineNote: npm registry advisory bulk endpoint returned 503 at capture time. Findings below were obtained from a prior successful audit run during the same session and are recorded in reports/ahin-p2p-runtime-audit-raw.json.

advisories.title: bigint-buffer Vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via toBigIntLE() Function
advisories.reachableFromPublicRootUiNote: Root renders <Gatekeeper> -> <AhinGateway/>. The Gatekeeper splash itself does not invoke any code path that calls bigint-buffer's toBigIntLE. Only the post-auth canary code path (LifePaymentModule.executeDeposit) transitively uses @solana/spl-token, and only when gateMode==='live' AND PoCC-eligible AND the user clicks Deposit. In current env (gateMode=mock), that path is unreachable.
advisories.reachableWithoutCanaryFlagsNote: Yes — readLifePlusBalanceRaw in lifePlusSolana.ts imports @solana/spl-token and is called by the Gatekeeper's verifySolanaPocc when gateMode==='live'. The Gatekeeper currently runs in gateMode=mock, so this path is not reachable at runtime today. If gateMode is flipped to 'live' for P3A (readonly live UI test), bigint-buffer code WOULD load, but only via getTokenAccountBalance whose input is the user's pubkey-derived ATA — not attacker-controlled raw bytes.
advisories.leadsToSigningOrTransferNote: No. Even if bigint-buffer's toBigIntLE were exploited, it cannot bypass the runtime AND-of-env-flags + canary gates in src/config/life-plus-payment.ts. Signing/transfer require AHIN_PROTOCOL_EXECUTION_ENABLED=true AND AHIN_REAL_USAGE_FEE_TRANSFER=true AND AHIN_PAYMENT_CANARY_ENABLED=true AND wallet allowlisted AND amount within cap. These are env-derived and not influenceable from runtime code.

availableFix.breakNote: 0.1.8 predates the modern SPL Token API used in src/lib/transactionSolana.ts (createTransferCheckedInstruction, getAssociatedTokenAddressSync). The current code would fail to build.

advisories.recommendation: ACCEPTED_RISK with documented exception OR upstream patch. Do not auto-fix.

advisories.title: uuid: Missing buffer bounds check in v3/v5/v6 when buf is provided
advisories.reachableFromPublicRootUiNote: uuid is used internally by @solana/web3.js for request correlation. Our code does not call uuid v3/v5/v6 directly. The advisory is only triggerable when caller passes an attacker-controlled `buf` argument to uuid.v3/v5/v6 — which we never do.
advisories.reachableWithoutCanaryFlagsNote: Same as bigint-buffer — loaded on any @solana/web3.js Connection construction.
advisories.leadsToSigningOrTransferNote: No mechanism for uuid bounds-check bypass to influence env flag evaluation.

availableFix.breakNote: Depends on whether @solana/web3.js's uuid pin is compatible with 11.x. npm overrides could be tried but risk SDK incompatibility.

advisories.recommendation: ACCEPTED_RISK with documented exception OR upstream fix from @solana/web3.js.

structuralMitigations: AND-of-explicit-env-flags safety model: INFRASTRUCTURE_TRANSFER_ARMED && canaryArmed && walletAllowlisted && amountWithinCap. No single advisory can bypass.
Wallet signing API confined to src/lib/walletAdapters.ts (release-lint enforced).
Transaction submission APIs confined to src/lib/walletAdapters.ts (release-lint enforced).
Burn instruction path forbidden everywhere (release-lint enforced).
/active-hash simulator + root governance routes are web3-free (release-lint enforced).
Dev routes (/api/dev/*) gated to non-production environments with AHIN_ENABLE_DEV_ROUTES=true (release-lint enforced).
grantAccess fires only after confirmation outcome — never on bare signature return (release-lint enforced).
PUBLIC_PAYMENT_ENABLED + BURN_ENABLED hardcoded false; no env override (release-lint enforced).
recommendation: DO NOT proceed to P3A or P3B until either: (a) the bigint-buffer + uuid advisories are resolved upstream by the Solana team; OR (b) a formal operator-approved accepted-risk exception is documented, signed by the security reviewer, and recorded in this repo with explicit acknowledgement that the vulnerabilities cannot be exploited under the AND-gate model.
